summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Marmitaria da Xai landing page. All features working perfectly including navbar navigation, hero section, menu cards, contact form with WhatsApp integration, mobile responsiveness, and all CTAs.
passed_tests: Navbar with all navigation links (Cardápio, Entrega, Como Funciona, Contato)
Hero section with Feijoada da Xai headline and WhatsApp/Menu buttons
Features bar with 4 items (Delivery, Hours, Feijoada Sábado, Taxa grátis)
Delivery section with 3 features and WhatsApp button
Menu section with 6 food cards showing P/M/G prices (R$18/22/28)
How it works section with 4 steps
Contact form with all fields (Name, WhatsApp, Address, Marmita select, Notes)
Form submission opens WhatsApp with formatted message
Mobile responsive hamburger menu (5 navigation links)
Footer with Instagram and business info
All WhatsApp buttons contain correct phone number (5567982017678)
External links work (Instagram, full menu store)
